_meta.description: Phase 2.6 — Itinerary quality rubric scores. 10 itineraries × 4 dimensions.

itineraries.label: Foodie Weekend — 3 days, 2 pax, mid-range, relaxed
itineraries.notes: All venues grounded and open at scheduled times. Day 2 had two consecutive food slots (docked 1 diversity point). Nightlife correctly placed in the evening. Budget consistent throughout.

itineraries.label: Culture Explorer — 5 days, solo, budget, moderate
itineraries.notes: Excellent category variety across all 5 days. One food venue on Day 3 was mid-range rather than budget (minor preference mismatch). All osm_ids verified in database.

itineraries.label: Family Vacation — 4 days, 4 pax, mid-range, relaxed
itineraries.notes: Strong preference alignment — beaches and nature well represented. Day 1 total transit was 78 min (borderline). No shopping venue on Day 4 (minor gap). All venues real.

itineraries.label: Luxury Romance — 4 days, 2 pax, luxury, moderate
itineraries.notes: Timing and transit excellent. One restaurant on Day 2 was mid-range priced rather than luxury (deducted 1 pref point). Art venues well chosen — Goa galleries correctly identified. All grounded.

itineraries.label: Heritage Walk — 5 days, 2 pax, mid-range, relaxed
itineraries.notes: Perfect preference match and rich variety. Day 3 had a church scheduled at 07:00 which does not open until 08:30 (feasibility docked 2 points). One venue osm_id resolved to a different branch of the same church (groundedness -1).

itineraries.label: Backpacker Blitz — 6 days, solo, budget, packed
itineraries.notes: High venue count matches packed pace. Day 5 had 3 food/cafe slots in a row (diversity -2). All venues cheap and grounded. Nightlife properly in evening slots.

itineraries.label: Girls Trip — 3 days, 4 pax, mid-range, packed
itineraries.notes: Shopping venues well chosen. Day 2 transit was 82 min (slightly high). One nightlife venue scheduled at 21:00 which is correct. No beach on Day 3 despite interest stated (minor gap).

itineraries.label: Nature Seeker — 4 days, solo, budget, moderate
itineraries.notes: Nature parks and reserves correctly included. Day 4 had a museum which is art, not history — loosely compatible. Transit excellent across all days. All venues verified.

itineraries.label: Nightlife Focus — 3 days, 6 pax, mid-range, packed
itineraries.notes: Strong nightlife and beach alignment. Day 2 had a beach club scheduled at 09:00 that opens at 11:00 (feasibility -1) and total Day 3 transit was 95 min (feasibility -1). Diversity lower — 4 out of 9 slots are food or cafe. All venues real.

itineraries.label: Art & Food — 4 days, 2 pax, luxury, relaxed
itineraries.notes: Exemplary output — art galleries, upscale restaurants, correct pacing. Day 3 had two gallery slots back-to-back (diversity -1). All osm_ids verified. Timing flawless.
